title: Bandits head coach Mrazek moving on; Nickell steps up
description: After 19 seasons with the Cranbrook Bandits American Legion Baseball Club, Coach Paul Mrazek is moving on — into a 36th season of coaching baseball.

title: Art Spaces luncheon honors Indiana's first U.S. Congresswoman
description: Wabash Valley Outdoor Sculpture Collection Inc. (Art Spaces) will host its 2026 annual luncheon, “Honoring a Trailblazer: Congresswoman Virginia E. Jenckes,” at the Country Club of Terre Haute, 57 Allendale Lane, at noon April 16.
